figures.caption: FIG. 8. The schematic representation of magnetic field vertices. H3,i represents diagonal magnetic vertices, H4,i represents off-diagonal magnetic vertices.

FIG. 5. Results of the autocorrelation time measured using the directed-loops algorithm (DI-L) under different tuning parameters ϵ as a function of the external magnetic field. The system size is L = 64, inverse temperature β = 16, and the series cutoff is set to ncut = 500. The symbols correspond to ϵ = 0.0 (red circles), 0.25 (blue squares), 0.5 (green triangles), 1.0 (yellow diamonds), and 2.0 (purple pentagons).(a) Integrated autocorrelation time τint[m z s ] computed from the antiferromagnetic order parameter mz s ;(b) CPU time per Monte Carlo step tCPU;(c) CPU time tint required to obtain two statistically independent samples.
